description_long: A thick, grilled steak sits atop a round, wooden plate, displaying a rich brown exterior with pronounced, dark grill marks running parallel across its surface. The steak has a slightly curved, bone-in edge, indicating it is likely a ribeye or similar cut, and the bone is visible on one side. The surface of the steak is glistening, suggesting it is juicy and freshly cooked, with a texture that appears both tender and slightly charred. The coloration ranges from deep brown to reddish hues, hinting at a medium level of doneness. A small sprig of green herb, possibly thyme, is placed beside the steak as a garnish. The plate itself is smooth and polished, complementing the rustic presentation of the steak.
description: A thick, bone-in grilled steak with pronounced grill marks sits on a round wooden plate, accompanied by a small herb garnish.
description_view_0: This view shows the steak's curved bone and the herb garnish on the left side of the plate, with grill marks clearly visible.
description_view_1: The steak appears flatter and wider from this angle, with the grill marks and juicy surface most prominent.
description_view_2: The bone is less visible, and the steak's thickness and grill marks are highlighted, with the garnish partially visible.
description_view_3: The bone is most visible from this side, and the herb garnish is clearly seen on the plate next to the steak.
attribute_grill_marks: The steak features pronounced, parallel grill marks running across its surface.
attribute_garnish_or_plating_style: A small sprig of green herb is placed beside the steak as garnish.
attribute_visible_fat_marbling: There is light fat marbling visible, mostly concentrated near the edges of the steak.
